evidence: Lines 134, 143, 159 contain spaced ellipsis '. . . .' which are ingestion artifacts from PDF extraction. North Dakota opinions use compact four-dot ellipsis format '....' per style convention. All three occurrences in the statute quotations (Section 65-04-32) are identical and should be collapsed to compact form.
note: These appear within quoted statutory text at lines 134 ('petition for reconsideration. . . . The'), 143 ('reconsideration. . . . If the'), and 159 ('for rehearing. . . .') All three are the same pattern and occur once each in the document.

evidence: The DB text contains an erroneous hard line break after the reporter citation '961 N.W.2d 303' immediately before the opening parenthesis of the quotation '([W]ithout...'. The authoritative PDF shows this should be a single continuous line with a space (not newline) separating the reporter and the quote. The Abdi v. State citation block was incorrectly split across lines during ingestion/markdown processing.
